product.title: Blanc Cover Cream Stick V White - Korean Color-Changing Foundation Stick with Volufiline - Medium to Full Coverage Dewy Finish Base Makeup - Dual-Ended with Detachable Brush (202 Natural)
featureBullets: COLOR-CHANGING STICK FOUNDATION. Meet your new beauty essential — the ELROEL Blanc Cover Stick V! This innovative color- changing makeup stick starts as a soft white balm and transforms into a silky, tinted cream that blends seamlessly into your skin. With each stroke of the built-in brush, collagen capsules break open to trigger the color change.

SKIN-FIRST APPROACH TO MAKEUP. The dewy, glazed look starts from within! Along with providing beautiful coverage, Blanc Cover Stick V has your skin covered, too. Infused with hard-working ingredients like Volufiline (20,000ppm), Hydrolyzed Collagen, Adenosine, and Niacinamide, this face stick foundation keeps your skin comfortable and moisturized.

DEWY? YES. GREASY? NEVER. Enjoy a clean, seamless application from start to finish. Creasing, caking, flaking? Not here. Sticky, greasy residue? Not with us. Our included brush and the cover up makeup foundation formula is a match made in heaven—designed to blend like a dream for that zero mess finish.

DUAL ENDED FOR DOUBLE DUTY. This clever double-duty face contour stick combines foundation and applicator in one sleek design. One end holds a balm foundation, the other a soft brush with 32,000 ultra-fine German bristles for a smooth, airbrushed finish. The detachable brush makes cleaning simple and hassle-free.

COMPACT & PORTABLE BY DESIGN. Midday touch-ups are a must—but who wants to deal with leaky liquid foundations or the struggle of stuffing makeup sponges into pouches? This dual-ended cover up make up foundation and brush stick is made for life on the go. No more heavy glass or extra puffs—this all-in-one stick does it all!

specification.value: Take out 1cm of product, apply directly to your face, and blend thoroughly with the detachable brush. Layer as desired.
Age-defying, Buildable, Dual sided, Hydrating, Moisturizing
#588 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #6 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation stick provides buildable coverage and matches skin tone well, with a natural, dewy finish that makes skin look flawless. The product receives positive feedback for its quality, with one customer noting it's a high-quality cream stick. The consistency receives mixed reviews - while some say it doesn't feel greasy, others find it makes their face feel greasy. Skin type reactions are also mixed, with some saying it makes skin look smooth and natural while others report it dries out their skin. The blendability receives mixed feedback, with some saying it blends nicely while others find it doesn't work well with their skin.

reviews.reviewText: Great product! Best color matching item on the market. It blends very well with my skin, it is super light weight and lasts all day without any touchup. The coverage is really amazing. It also keeps my skin moisturized without feeling greasy. Best value for the money!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I originally purchased this for my purse as a quick, on-the-go makeup option, but I’m enjoying it so much that I’m considering switching to it for everyday use. I haven’t had any issues with the brush, though I do keep a backup just in case. The natural coverage lasts throughout the day, and when I’m at home, I like to apply concealer first to cover my dark spots. Overall, it’s convenient, fast, and performs as described—definitely worth every penny.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Worth $5 USD and yet they’re charging almost $30!!! Just for your info: I’m 60 y/o with fair, sensitive skin with normal skin moisture (not dry/not oily). Unlike other cream makeup foundations & concealers on sticks, this product turned out to be super dry. It’s so dry that I decided to use Eucerin intensive care moisturizer prior to applying it, which helped but obviously, it isn’t ideal as it defeats the purpose for a “creamy foundation” that’s supposed to be well, CREAMY! It’s definitely white but unlike advertised, it does NOT change its color as I applied it on my super fair facial skin!! Just a little bit of it made me look like a ghost! Also, it does NOT cover any blemishes, not even the faintest of spots, which I only have less than a hand full on my face, mostly on the corners of my eyes. I guess this could work for younger women with very oily skin, as this product definitely dries up the skin. However, it only works as a “see through” foundation and it definitely “whitens” even the whitest of skin tones! It’s super dry on the skin so no only it defeats its purpose but I know it’d harm my skin on long term. There are much better skin/facial makeup foundations on today’s market, which ideally match or at least come close to matching our skin color tones…rather than just make it whiter while failing to cover the slightest (or lightest if you will) of small blemishes. In the past, I’ve purchased products like this in liquid form (on “pump” small glass containers) that actually change color once applied and it works far better as foundation, especially when it comes to moisturizing and covering blemishes (and even as sunblockers) than this product does! I agree with one reviewer here, who like myself, had issues keeping the brush lid on while applying the product on her facial skin. It doesn’t always happen but the brush lid can and it does come off easily, especially if we’re not careful about holding the stick above the bush lid, which obviously isn’t ideal, rather super inconvenient and annoying, especially when if we’re in a hurry, which to me personally is the main point and purpose of purchasing makeup products that come on sticks! The brush itself is firm, which I like but then again, since mine is sensitive skin, it’s another thing that I must be careful about as extra firm brushes can definitely be too harsh if I’m not careful while using it on my sensitive facial skin. The firm brush is however ideal for this product as a soft brush couldn’t possibly work to evenly distribute extremely dry facial makeup products. I’m super disappointed, especially considering that this is supposedly a Korean product and that I never had any issues and was never disappointed with Made in Korea skin and makeup products…until now! I’ve found much, much better and far less costly Korean makeup and skin care products at stores such as Marshall’s and TJMAXX and I can honestly say that this product doesn’t come close to living up to the Korean standards that I’ve been so happy with for many years now! This was a total waste of my time and money! NOPE…I DON’T recommend this product!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 5, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’m 53 and I’ve never had Botox, fillers, or any type of skin treatment, so I definitely deal with natural creases and wrinkles. This cream stick foundation has worked really well for me. I picked the right shade for my skin tone and pH, and I always prep my skin with moisturizer before using it. It blends easily, and once I add my cream blush, it all comes together nicely. The quality of the stick itself feels great, although I do not like the brush on the end. I’ve never had any issues with stickiness or the tube malfunctioning. I’m a teacher, and since I started wearing this, several colleagues have asked me what makeup I’m using because the finish looks so good. It leaves my skin with a soft, dewy look that lasts all day. After a long workday—sometimes 16 hours—I can see it has settled into my natural creases, but I still have good coverage. For me, it’s lightweight and natural .
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 10, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This foundation stick is so easy to apply, goes on white and blends in to perfection!! Leaves light-weight coverage so your skin still breaths. The texture is smooth, easy to wash off, and does no harm to my skin. Worth every cent. Best thing I’ve ever put on my face. Someone else mentioned it was white and didn’t match her skin tone… that is operator problems. She either applies it way too thick and / or ordered a shade too light.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It arrived broken, almost 80 dollars in a broken product 👎🏻
Original product and received on time.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in Saudi Arabia on August 11, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Blend right in to your complexion!
reviews.reviewText: Works great no issues happy with purchase!
